title: alyssum diffusum subsp. diffusum
intro: Alyssum diffusum subsp. diffusum, also known as Sweet Alyssum or Small-flowered Alyssum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Alyssum diffusum subsp. diffusum include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, and its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine as a poultice or topical application to treat skin conditions and wounds.
